'''Horsea''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Kiffar/Legends|Kiffar]], and a member of the [[Kiffu Guardians]]. In [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]], she and [[Vanlin]] shot down a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] ship piloted by [[Merglyn]] and [[Havor]], who were attempting to smuggle [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] onto [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]].
